fetchLatestTrxDetailsInDateRange: async (db, financeId, lastDate) => {
        return await db
        .select(
            `ft.finance_id`, 
            `ft.transaction_event`,
            db.raw(`CASE 
                WHEN fin.updated_approved_due_date IS NOT NULL
                THEN fin.updated_approved_due_date
                ELSE fin.approved_due_date
                END AS dueDate`),
        )
        .from(`lendingfinance.finance_transactions AS ft`)
        .join(`lendingfinance.finance As fin`, function(){

      .select(`cfcp.id`)
      .from(`lendingcreditfacility.credit_facility_counter_parties AS cfcp`)
      .where(`cfcp.credit_facility_id`, creditFacilityId)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.counter_party_id`, counterPartyId)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.product_type`, productType)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.product_category`, productCategory)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.finance_type`, financeType)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.deleted_at`, null)
        },

    let checkApplicantCounterPartyCombination = await db
      .select(`cfcp.id`)
      .from(`lendingcreditfacility.credit_facility_counter_parties_request AS cfcp`)
      .where(`cfcp.credit_facility_id`, creditFacilityId)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.counter_party_id`, counterPartyId)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.product_type`, productType)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.product_category`, productCategory)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.finance_type`, financeType)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.request_id`, requestId)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.deleted_at`, null)
      
      return checkApplicantCounterPartyCombination;
  },

    return await
      db
        .select(`*`)
        .from(`lendingcreditfacility.credit_limit_charges AS cl_charges`)
        .whereIn(`cl_charges.credit_charges_batch_id`, creditLimitBatchIds)
        .whereIn(`cl_charges.credit_limit_request_id`, creditLimitIds)

        .orderBy(`cl_charges.credit_limit_request_id`);

getCounterPartyLimit: async(db, counterPartyId, productType, productCategory, financeType) => {
    let [query] = await db.select(db.raw(`
      CASE when counter_party_usable_limit IS NOT NULL then CAST(counter_party_usable_limit AS FLOAT)
      else CAST(counter_party_credit_limit AS FLOAT) end as counter_party_limit
    `))
    .from('lendingcreditfacility.credit_facility_counter_parties as cfcp')
    .where('cfcp.counter_party_id', counterPartyId)
    .andWhere(`cfcp.product_type`, productType)
    .andWhere(`cfcp.product_category`, productCategory)
    .andWhere(`cfcp.finance_type`, financeType)
    .whereNotIn(`cfcp.counter_party_status`, [creditLimitStates.REJECTED])
    .andWhere(`cfcp.deleted_at`, null);
    return query;
  },

    const creditNoteSubquery = db
      .select(

        'cn.currency as credit_note_currency'

      .from('lending.credit_notes as cn')
      .where('cn.owner_type', 'ANNUAL_FACILITY_FEE')

getRequestCPId: async (db, requestId, cpDetail) => {
    let [id] = await db
      .select(`cfcp.id`)
      .from(`lendingcreditfacility.credit_facility_counter_parties_request AS cfcp`)
      .where(`cfcp.credit_facility_id`, cpDetail.credit_facility_id)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.counter_party_id`, cpDetail.counter_party_id)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.product_type`, cpDetail.product_type)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.product_category`, cpDetail.product_category)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.finance_type`, cpDetail.finance_type)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.request_id`, requestId)
      .andWhere(`cfcp.deleted_at`, null)
      
      return id;
  },
